summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Password Reset Feature for KOLOR STUDIO CRM - all backend APIs (11/11) and frontend features working correctly. Rate limiting, token validation, password strength indicator, and form validations all functioning as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 200 for existing email (prevents enumeration)
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 200 for non-existent email (same message for security)
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 400 for empty email
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 400 for missing email field
Backend: Rate limiting works - 4th request blocked with 429 status
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects invalid token with 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects expired/non-existent token
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects password shorter than 8 chars
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects missing token field
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects missing password field
Backend: Login still works after password reset feature implementation
Frontend: Login page has 'Forgot password?' link
Frontend: Forgot password link navigates to /forgot-password
Frontend: /forgot-password page displays email input, submit button, back to login link
Frontend: Empty email validation shows error message
Frontend: Form submission shows success state with 'Check your email' message
Frontend: Success message shows 1-hour expiry notice
Frontend: /reset-password/:token page displays password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Password strength indicator shows 'Weak' for weak passwords
Frontend: Password strength indicator shows 'Medium' for medium passwords
Frontend: Password strength indicator shows 'Strong' for strong passwords
Frontend: Confirm password shows 'Passwords do not match' for mismatched passwords
Frontend: Confirm password shows 'Passwords match' with green checkmark when matched
Frontend: Invalid token shows error 'Password reset token is invalid or has expired'
Frontend: Back to login link present on both forgot-password and reset-password pages
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Email enumeration attack prevented - same response for existing and non-existing emails
Good: Rate limiting implemented with in-memory Map (3 requests per hour per email)
Good: Password reset tokens hashed with SHA256 before storing in database
Good: Tokens are single-use (cleared after successful password reset)
Good: Password strength indicator with 3 levels (Weak/Medium/Strong)
Good: Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: No seed data required - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password Reset feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints /api/auth/forgot-password and /api/auth/reset-password work correctly. Rate limiting is in-memory (resets on server restart). Email is sent via Resend integration. Token is stored hashed in database with 1-hour expiry. Frontend pages /forgot-password and /reset-password/:token have all proper validations and UX features.
